heading: Online Archive & Atlas Data Federation
body:
| Data Federation Region | Azure (Microsoft Azure) Region | Atlas Region  |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------------ | ------------- |
| Virginia, USA          | eastus2                        | US\_EAST\_2   |
| Sao Paulo, Brazil      | brazilsouth                    | BRAZIL\_SOUTH |
| Netherlands            | westeurope                     | EUROPE\_WEST  |

> **Important:** Atlas encrypts your archived data using [Azure Storage
> service-side encryption](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/common/storage-service-encryption#about-azure-storage-service-side-encryption\)).
> Atlas can't use any encryption-at-rest encryption keys that you
> used on your cluster data.
